meta.title: Oder Agency | AI Growth Partner
meta.description: The only growth partner who codes, writes, and sells. We build AI systems that handle your operations while you focus on the product.
meta.keywords: AI automation, growth partner, business automation, AI systems, operations automation

hero.headline: The only growth partner who codes, writes, and sells.
hero.headlineAccent: You build the product. We handle the rest.
hero.subhead: Most businesses hit a ceiling because operations eat all the hours. We build AI systems that take over the repetitive work so your team focuses on what actually moves the needle.

problem.title: This is probably your week.
problem.subtitle: Your product works. You have customers. But growth stalled and you can't figure out why.

items.title: Leads slip through at night
items.desc: Someone fills out your form at 11 PM. By morning, they already talked to your competitor who replied in 30 seconds.

items.title: Your team does the same thing 200 times a day
items.desc: Follow-ups, scheduling, data entry. Your best people spend 60% of their day on work a machine could do better.

items.title: Every hire costs more than the last
items.desc: You need to grow but each new person means another salary, another onboarding, another management layer. The math stops working.

items.title: The last agency gave you a PDF and disappeared
items.desc: You paid monthly. Got reports. Sat in calls. But nothing actually changed in your revenue. Sound familiar?

solution.title: We build the systems. They do the work.
solution.subtitle: Not a dashboard you check once. Not a report that collects dust. Actual running systems that respond, qualify, book, and follow up. Every day. Every hour.

cols.title: Automate
cols.desc: We replace the repetitive manual tasks your team hates. Sales follow-ups, appointment booking, customer responses. All automated.

cols.title: Scale
cols.desc: Grow your capacity without growing your headcount. AI doesn't need training days, sick leave, or a raise every quarter.

cols.title: Measure
cols.desc: Every system We build comes with real numbers. Appointments booked, leads captured, revenue traced back to the automation.

solutions.title: What I Build
solutions.subtitle: Each system is custom-built for your specific operations.

process.title: How it works.
process.subtitle: Three steps. No mystery. You know exactly what's happening at every stage.

steps.title: Audit
steps.desc: We spend 3-5 days inside your operations. Map every workflow, find the bottlenecks, rank them by ROI. You get a clear roadmap even if you don't work with us.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: We deploy the highest-impact system first. Integrated with your existing workflows, customized for your business, tested before it touches a real customer.

steps.title: Scale
steps.desc: First system live and producing results? Good. Now We expand. New workflows, new channels. Your AI infrastructure compounds as your business grows.

whyUs.title: Why me?
whyUs.subtitle: We're not an agency. We're operators who build and run the systems ourselves.

items.title: No middlemen
items.desc: You talk to the person who builds your system. No account managers, no junior handoffs, no telephone game.

items.title: Results or nothing
items.desc: We measure everything in booked appointments, captured leads, and saved hours. Not impressions, not clicks, not vanity metrics.

items.title: Annual partnership
items.desc: We commit to your growth for the long run because real results compound over time. Quarterly reviews keep us aligned and accountable.

items.title: We build it ourselves
items.desc: We don't consult and hand you a strategy doc. We design the systems, deploy the automations, and keep them running.

good.title: Good fit if you...
items: Run a service business with 5-200 people
Lose leads because your team can't respond fast enough
Want to grow without hiring proportionally
Care about measurable outcomes, not marketing fluff
Are ready to invest in systems that compound

bad.title: Not the right fit if you...
items: Want the cheapest option regardless of what you get
Need a full marketing agency (ads, social, content)
Need results overnight. Real systems take 2-4 weeks.

faq.title: Questions we get asked a lot

items.q: How long until something is actually live?
items.a: Most systems go live within 2-4 weeks. Simpler automations can be running in 5-7 days. Complex multi-system setups take 4-6 weeks.

items.q: What if the AI says something wrong to my customer?
items.a: Every system has a human escalation path. When the AI isn't confident, it routes the conversation to your team. We also monitor and tune accuracy continuously.

items.q: I'm not technical. Is that a problem?
items.a: Not at all. We handle the entire technical side. You get a simple dashboard that shows what's working and what the numbers look like.

items.q: How does the partnership model work?
items.a: We work on annual partnerships with quarterly reviews. This gives enough time for systems to mature and deliver compounding returns.
It depends on scope and complexity. We charge a setup fee plus a monthly retainer. Some services run on a pay-per-result model. Book a call and we'll give you exact numbers for your situation.
No. AWe handles the repetitive, high-volume stuff. Your people get freed up for the work that actually requires a human brain. It's addition, not subtraction.

cta.title: Let's figure out what to automate first.
cta.subtitle: 20 minutes. No pitch deck. I'll look at your operations and tell you exactly which process would give you the biggest return if automated.
cta.note: Free. No commitment. We reply within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Not an agency. Your growth partner.

apply.title: Tell me about your business.
apply.subtitle: Fill this out in 2 minutes. I'll review it personally and get back to you within 24 hours with a specific plan.

fields.name: Your name
fields.solution: What takes up the most time in your operations?
solutionOptions: Not sure, need a fresh pair of eyes
fields.timeline: When do you want to start?

success.title: Got it.
success.message: I'll review your details and get back within 24 hours. Check your inbox.

about.headline: We build it. We run it. We own the outcome.
about.story: Oder Agency was founded by Oltan Seven, a developer and automation specialist based in Antalya, Turkey. After years of building web applications and AI tools, one thing became obvious: businesses don't need more software. They need systems that actually do the work without someone babysitting them.
about.story2: That's what we do. We build AI systems that handle sales, support, and operations on their own. No dashboards collecting dust. No weekly reports nobody reads. Just working systems that you can measure in revenue and hours saved.

items.title: Direct line
items.desc: You talk to me. The person writing the code and connecting the systems. No layers.

items.title: Outcomes over effort
items.desc: We don't bill for hours. We optimize for your results.

items.title: Full transparency
items.desc: You see everything. Costs, performance, what's working and what's not.

items.title: Gets better over time
items.desc: AI systems improve with data. We monitor, tune, and expand as your business grows.

approach.headline: Audit. Build. Scale.
approach.subtitle: We don't start with a pitch. We start by understanding your operations, then build systems that compound.

steps.title: Operations Audit
steps.desc: 3-5 days. We map your workflows, find the bottlenecks, and rank every automation opportunity by ROI. You walk away with a clear roadmap even if you don't work with us.

steps.title: System Build
steps.desc: We deploy the highest-impact system first. Integrated with your tools, trained on your context, tested before it touches a real customer.

steps.title: Scale & Optimize
steps.desc: First system producing? Good. Now We expand. New workflows, new channels, continuous tuning. Your AI infrastructure grows with you.

antiAgency.title: What makes this different
items: We don't sell retainers. We sell outcomes. If the system doesn't work, you don't pay.
No agency overhead. No account managers. You work directly with the person building your systems.
We use everything we recommend. Every tool, every workflow, every integration runs in our own projects first.
